# QIDI Box generated config reference

## Source

Captured Python source:

- `tmp/qidi-box-reversing/20260507-135653-printer-capture/root/home/qidi/klipper/klippy/extras/box_config.py`

Stock config input:

- `docs/qidi_box/qidi_box_stock_config_surface.md`

`box_config.py` is not compiled; it translates one `[box_config boxN]` section into normal Klipper object sections at runtime.

## Object graph generated by `[box_config box0]`

For `box_num = 0`, `base_offset = box_num * 4 = 0`.

| Generated object name | Source module / loader | Generated source config |
|---|---|---|
| `box_stepper slot0` | `box_stepper.BoxExtruderStepper` | stepper keys with `_0` suffix plus common stepper keys |
| `box_stepper slot1` | `box_stepper.BoxExtruderStepper` | stepper keys with `_1` suffix plus common stepper keys |
| `box_stepper slot2` | `box_stepper.BoxExtruderStepper` | stepper keys with `_2` suffix plus common stepper keys |
| `box_stepper slot3` | `box_stepper.BoxExtruderStepper` | stepper keys with `_3` suffix plus common stepper keys |
| `heater_generic heater_box1` | `heaters.setup_heater(...)` | `heater_generic` keys and `verify_heater heater_box1` keys |
| `temperature_sensor heater_temp_a_box1` | `temperature_sensor.load_config_prefix(...)` | temperature sensor keys with `_temperature_sensor_0` suffix |
| `temperature_sensor heater_temp_b_box1` | `temperature_sensor.load_config_prefix(...)` | temperature sensor keys with `_temperature_sensor_1` suffix |
| `box_heater_fan heater_fan_a_box1` | `box_heater_fan.load_config_prefix(...)` | fan keys with `_box_heater_fan_0` suffix |
| `box_heater_fan heater_fan_b_box1` | `box_heater_fan.load_config_prefix(...)` | fan keys with `_box_heater_fan_1` suffix |
| `controller_fan board_fan_box1` | `controller_fan.load_config_prefix(...)` | controller fan keys with `_controller_fan` suffix |
| `box_rfid card_reader_1` | `box_rfid.load_config_prefix(...)` | `cs_pin_box_rfid_0` |
| `box_rfid card_reader_2` | `box_rfid.load_config_prefix(...)` | `cs_pin_box_rfid_1` |

`box_config.py` generates two `box_rfid` reader objects for one `[box_config box0]`. `multi_color_controller.LocalAdapter.connect()` still attempts lookups for `box_rfid card_reader_1` through `box_rfid card_reader_4`; the latter two are absent on this one-box capture unless another include creates them.

## Generated slot stepper config

For each physical slot, `build_config(..., module='stepper')` maps these indexed keys by suffix:

| Generated key | `[box_config box0]` source key for slot0 | slot1 | slot2 | slot3 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `runout_pin` | `runout_pin_0` | `runout_pin_1` | `runout_pin_2` | `runout_pin_3` |
| `step_pin` | `step_pin_0` | `step_pin_1` | `step_pin_2` | `step_pin_3` |
| `dir_pin` | `dir_pin_0` | `dir_pin_1` | `dir_pin_2` | `dir_pin_3` |
| `enable_pin` | `enable_pin_0` | `enable_pin_1` | `enable_pin_2` | `enable_pin_3` |
| `white_pin` | `white_pin_0` | `white_pin_1` | `white_pin_2` | `white_pin_3` |
| `red_pin` | `red_pin_0` | `red_pin_1` | `red_pin_2` | `red_pin_3` |

Common stepper keys are copied unchanged into every generated slot section:

```text
step_pulse_duration
rotation_distance
microsteps
```

## Generated heater config

`build_config(..., module='heater_generic')` creates generated section `heater_generic heater_box1` from these keys:

| Generated key | `[box_config box0]` source key |
|---|---|
| `heater_pin` | `heater_pin_heater_generic` |
| `sensor_type` | `sensor_type_heater_generic` |
| `i2c_bus` | `i2c_bus_heater_generic` |
| `i2c_mcu` | `i2c_mcu_heater_generic` |
| `i2c_address` | `i2c_address_heater_generic` |
| `control` | `control_heater_generic` |
| `pid_Kp` | `pid_Kp_heater_generic` |
| `pid_Ki` | `pid_Ki_heater_generic` |
| `pid_Kd` | `pid_Kd_heater_generic` |
| `min_temp` | `min_temp_heater_generic` |
| `max_temp` | `max_temp_heater_generic` |
| `target_max_temp` | `target_max_temp_heater_generic` |

It also adds generated section `verify_heater heater_box1` from:

| Generated key | `[box_config box0]` source key |
|---|---|
| `max_error` | `max_error_verify_heater` |
| `check_gain_time` | `check_gain_time_verify_heater` |
| `is_box_heater` | `is_box_heater_verify_heater` |

## Generated temperature sensors

`build_config(..., module='temperature_sensor')` maps these keys with suffix `_temperature_sensor_<num>`:

```text
sensor_type
sensor_pin
min_temp
max_temp
```

`num=0` becomes `temperature_sensor heater_temp_a_box1`.

`num=1` becomes `temperature_sensor heater_temp_b_box1`.

## Generated fans

`build_config(..., module='box_heater_fan')` maps these keys with suffix `_box_heater_fan_<num>`:

```text
pin
heater
heater_temp
stepper
idle_timeout
```

`num=0` becomes `box_heater_fan heater_fan_a_box1`.

`num=1` becomes `box_heater_fan heater_fan_b_box1`.

`build_config(..., module='controller_fan')` maps these keys with suffix `_controller_fan`:

```text
pin
heater
stepper
```

The generated controller fan object is `controller_fan board_fan_box1`.

## Generated RFID readers

`build_config(..., module='box_rfid')` maps only:

```text
cs_pin
```

| Generated reader | Source key |
|---|---|
| `box_rfid card_reader_1` | `cs_pin_box_rfid_0` |
| `box_rfid card_reader_2` | `cs_pin_box_rfid_1` |

The two generated readers match the two chip-select pins in `box.cfg`. Four physical slots therefore do not map one-to-one to four generated RFID objects in this captured source.

## Multi-box naming

For `[box_config boxN]`:

```text
base_offset = N * 4
slot objects = slot<base_offset> .. slot<base_offset + 3>
heater_box = heater_box<N + 1>
heater_temp_a_box = heater_temp_a_box<N + 1>
heater_temp_b_box = heater_temp_b_box<N + 1>
heater_fan_a_box = heater_fan_a_box<N + 1>
heater_fan_b_box = heater_fan_b_box<N + 1>
board_fan_box = board_fan_box<N + 1>
card_reader ids = <N * 2 + 1>, <N * 2 + 2>
```

For a second `[box_config box1]`, the generated slot names would be `slot4`..`slot7`, heater/fan names would end in `box2`, and RFID readers would be `card_reader_3` and `card_reader_4`.
